verse.name: V1
verse.lines: He is here, hallelujah! He is here, Amen! He is here, Holy, Holy! I will bless His holy name; He is here, listen closely, Hear Him calling out your name, He is here, you can touch Him, You will never be the same.

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: I sense an awesome Moving of the Holy Spirit, I see His countenance Resting on each face, I know that there are angels Gathering all around us For the Presence of the Lord is in this place.

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: I searched for peace among The shadows dark and lonely, Gave up on finding that strong and lasting love, I tasted all the things that sin, Could seek to offer me, But today I feast on manna from above.
